summary: Completed backend testing of API-Football integration endpoints. All 3 endpoints (/leagues, /search, /import) are working correctly from a code perspective. CRITICAL: The APIFOOTBALL_API_KEY in backend/.env is for a SUSPENDED account - returns empty responses.

critical.issue: APIFOOTBALL_API_KEY is suspended - API returns empty response with error 'Your account is suspended, check on https://dashboard.api-football.com'

minor.issue: No error handling for suspended/invalid API keys - silently returns empty results instead of raising an error
minor.suggestion: Check for 'errors' field in API response and raise HTTPException if account issues detected

details: POST /import enforces max 10 match limit per matchday (returns 400)
POST /import returns proper response structure (imported, skipped, matches, skipped_details)

api_data_tests.reason: API-Football account suspended - cannot validate league/fixture data

caching.status: VERIFIED - Second call uses cache (no additional API requests visible in logs)

action_items: CRITICAL: Replace APIFOOTBALL_API_KEY in backend/.env with a valid, active API-Football account key
RECOMMENDED: Add error handling in apifootball.py to check for 'errors' field in API response and raise appropriate exceptions
After API key is fixed: Re-run tests to verify data validation (5 leagues, required fields, fixture import with external_provider)
critical_code_review_comments: apifootball.py: No validation of API response 'errors' field - suspended/invalid keys fail silently with empty results
Code structure is correct - 3 endpoints, admin auth, caching, import logic with duplicate protection and max limit all work

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 code-level tests passed, 6 skipped due to API suspension)

seed_data_creation: Created temporary test matchday (number=98) for import testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: API-Football integration code is correct but cannot be fully tested due to suspended API key. Once key is replaced: verify /leagues returns 5 leagues, /search returns fixtures, /import creates matches with external_provider='api-football' and external_fixture_id fields. Background scheduler logic exists but was not tested (requires live matches).
